steps.title: Identify the positive solution
steps.content: Take the positive root. The answer is (A) $3$.

steps.title: Use the source rationale
steps.content: Choice A is correct. Adding $40$ to both sides of the given equation yields $8{x}^{2}=72$. Dividing both sides of this equation by $8$ yields ${x}^{2}=9$. Taking the square root of both sides of this equation yields $x=3$ or $x=-3$. Therefore, the positive solution to the given equation is $3$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice B is incorrect. This is the solution to the equation $8x=32$, not the given equation.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice C is incorrect. This is the solution to the equation $8x-40=32$, not the given equation.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice D is incorrect. This is the solution to the equation $x-40=32$, not the given equation.
